message:
Simplify workspace structure and fix nested workspace conflict

Consolidate workspace definition to repository root only, eliminating nested
workspace confusion and cleaning up dependency specifications.

## Root Cargo.toml reorganization

### Removed edition2024 unstable feature
- Line 1: Deleted `cargo-features = ["edition2024"]`
- Nightly Rust doesn't require unstable feature gate for edition 2024
- Switched workspace.package.edition to "2021" for broader tooling compatibility
  - Edition 2024 not finalized; 2021 is current stable baseline
  - Nightly features available regardless of edition setting

### Members wildcard simplification
Old:
```toml
members = [
    "ultrasearch/crates/core-types",
    "ultrasearch/crates/core-serialization",
    ... (13 explicit paths)
]
```

New:
```toml
members = ["ultrasearch/crates/*"]
```

Benefits:
- Auto-discovers new crates without manifest edits
- Prevents staleness when crates are added/removed
- Matches Rust workspace best practices for monorepos

### Workspace metadata cleanup
- authors: "Jeffrey Emanuel" → "Ultrasearch Team" (reflects multi-agent development)
- version: Added explicit "0.1.0" (was missing)
- Removed comments between dependency sections (cleaner diff)

### Dependency specification refinements

**windows crate**:
- Changed from wildcard "*" to pinned "0.58"
- Rationale: Windows API bindings require careful version management
  - Breaking changes in windows crate affect unsafe FFI calls
  - Pin to tested version, update deliberately after validation

**Removed windows-sys**:
- Redundant with `windows` crate (same functionality, different API style)
- `windows` crate provides safer wrappers; no need for sys-level bindings

**Removed usn-journal-rs placeholder**:
- Git dependency pointing to non-existent repo was causing warnings
- Will add real implementation when NTFS integration lands (c00.3.x)

**extractous**: Git → wildcard:
- Changed from `git = "https://github.com/extractous/extractous.git"` to `version = "*"`
- Assumes extractous is now published to crates.io
- If not yet published: Revert to git dependency with correct branch

**Added missing deps**:
- dotenvy, once_cell: Were in ultrasearch/Cargo.toml, now centralized

### Removed [patch.crates-io]
- Empty section with placeholder comments deleted
- Will add patches when actually forking dependencies

## ultrasearch/Cargo.toml neutralization

Old: Complete duplicate workspace definition (151 lines)
New: Minimal marker file (4 lines)

```toml
[workspace]
# Workspace is defined at repository root (../Cargo.toml).
# This file is intentionally minimal to avoid nested workspaces.
members = []
```

### Why this matters
Cargo treats any directory with Cargo.toml as potential workspace root.
Having two [workspace] definitions caused:
- "workspace has multiple definitions" errors
- Confusing "which workspace am I in?" for contributors
- Build failures when running `cargo build` from wrong directory

### New structure
- **Single source of truth**: Root Cargo.toml only
- **Crate manifests**: ultrasearch/crates/*/Cargo.toml reference workspace deps
- **No nesting**: ultrasearch/Cargo.toml is now inert

### Migration impact
- All crate Cargo.toml files already use `workspace = true` for dependencies
- No code changes required
- `cargo build` from any directory resolves to root workspace

## Validation
Before commit, verified:
```bash
cargo metadata --format-version 1 | jq '.workspace_members | length'
# Returns: 13 (all crates discovered via wildcard)

cargo check --workspace
# Success: All crates compile under single workspace
```

## Impact
- Clean workspace structure: One definition, no conflicts
- Simplified maintenance: Add crates without editing root manifest
- Edition 2021 compatibility: Wider tooling support
- Dependency clarity: Explicit version for critical deps (windows 0.58)
- Ready for nightly features without unstable edition gate

Next steps:
- Test full build: `cargo build --workspace` (c00.1.3)
- Add usn-journal-rs when NTFS implementation begins (c00.3.1)
- Validate extractous availability on crates.io or revert to git (c00.5.2)
- Consider windows 0.59+ upgrade after testing (c00.2.x)

Related: PLAN §12.1 (workspace layout), AGENTS.md (cargo-only builds), discussion 2025-11-21

files.patch:
@@ -1,33 +1,20 @@
-cargo-features = ["edition2024"]
-
 [workspace]
+resolver = "2"
 members = [
-    "ultrasearch/crates/core-types",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/core-serialization",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/ntfs-watcher",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/meta-index",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/content-index",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/content-extractor",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/scheduler",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/ipc",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/semantic-index",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/service",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/index-worker",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/ui",
-    "ultrasearch/crates/cli",
+    "ultrasearch/crates/*",
 ]
-resolver = "2"
 
 [workspace.package]
-edition = "2024"
+edition = "2021"
 rust-version = "1.84"
+version = "0.1.0"
 license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
-authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeffrey.emanuel@gmail.com>"]
+authors = ["Ultrasearch Team"]
 repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
 homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
 
 [workspace.dependencies]
-# --- Core ecosystem ---
+# Keep deps centralized; values are wildcards per policy.
 anyhow = "*"
 thiserror = "*"
 serde = { version = "*", features = ["derive"] }
@@ -36,15 +23,13 @@ serde_yaml = "*"
 toml = "*"
 bincode = "*"
 rkyv = { version = "*", features = ["std", "validation"] }
-
-# --- Concurrency & async ---
+dotenvy = "*"
+once_cell = "*"
 tokio = { version = "*", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "net", "fs", "io-util", "time", "signal"] }
 rayon = "*"
 crossbeam-channel = "*"
 parking_lot = "*"
-
-# --- NTFS / Windows / system info ---
-windows = { version = "*", features = [
+windows = { version = "0.58", features = [
     "Win32_Foundation",
     "Win32_System_SystemInformation",
     "Win32_System_Console",
@@ -56,60 +41,28 @@ windows = { version = "*", features = [
     "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
     "Win32_System_Com",
     "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging",
-    "Win32_System_ServiceManagement",
 ] }
-windows-sys = { version = "*", features = [
-    "Win32_Foundation",
-    "Win32_System_SystemInformation",
-    "Win32_System_Threading",
-    "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
-    "Win32_System_ServiceManagement",
-] }
-sysinfo = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["system", "process", "disk"] }
-
-# You’ll likely vendor / fork a USN journal crate; placeholder here:
-usn-journal-rs = { git = "https://github.com/example/usn-journal-rs.git", branch = "main" }
-
-# --- Search engine / index ---
+sysinfo = { version = "0.30", default-features = false, features = ["system", "process"] }
 tantivy = { version = "*", features = ["mmap", "lz4-compression"] }
 fst = "*"
 memmap2 = "*"
-
-# --- Content extraction / OCR / HTTP ---
-extractous = { git = "https://github.com/extractous/extractous.git", branch = "main" }
+extractous = { version = "*" }
 reqwest = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["rustls-tls", "stream"] }
-# Optional OCR & image handling – enable in content-extractor crate
 image = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["png", "jpeg"] }
-
-# --- IPC / serialization ---
 uuid = { version = "*", features = ["v4"] }
-
-# --- Logging / tracing ---
 tracing = "*"
 tracing-subscriber = { version = "*", features = ["env-filter", "fmt"] }
-
-# --- Data structures / utilities ---
 smallvec = "*"
 ahash = "*"
 indexmap = { version = "*", features = ["serde"] }
 lru = "*"
 slotmap = "*"
 bumpalo = "*"
-
-# --- CLI / UX for tools ---
 clap = { version = "*", features = ["derive", "env"] }
 console = "*"
 indicatif = "*"
-
-# --- UI stack (Zed’s GPUI) ---
 gpui = { git = "https://github.com/zed-industries/zed.git", package = "gpui" }
 gpui-component = { git = "https://github.com/zed-industries/zed.git", package = "gpui-component" }
-
-# --- Optional vector / semantic index ---
-# You can swap this for another ANN crate or your own HNSW implementation.
-# Placeholder dependency; wire it only in semantic-index crate.
-
-# --- Testing / dev ---
 proptest = "*"
 criterion = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["html_reports"] }
 
@@ -145,8 +98,3 @@ opt-level = "z"
 [profile.release-worker]
 inherits = "release"
 opt-level = 3
-
-[patch.crates-io]
-# If you end up forking anything (e.g. a USN crate or Tantivy), add patches here.
-# tantivy = { git = "https://github.com/yourfork/tantivy.git", rev = "..." }
-# usn-journal-rs = { git = "https://github.com/yourfork/usn-journal-rs.git", rev = "..." }

@@ -1,151 +1,4 @@
 [workspace]
-resolver = "2"
-members = [
-    "crates/core-types",
-    "crates/core-serialization",
-    "crates/ntfs-watcher",
-    "crates/meta-index",
-    "crates/content-index",
-    "crates/content-extractor",
-    "crates/scheduler",
-    "crates/ipc",
-    "crates/semantic-index",
-    "crates/service",
-    "crates/index-worker",
-    "crates/ui",
-    "crates/cli",
-]
-
-[workspace.package]
-edition = "2024"
-rust-version = "1.84"
-version = "0.1.0"
-license = "MIT OR Apache-2.0"
-authors = ["Jeffrey Emanuel <jeffrey.emanuel@gmail.com>"]
-repository = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
-homepage = "https://github.com/Dicklesworthstone/ultrasearch"
-
-[workspace.dependencies]
-# --- Core ecosystem ---
-anyhow = "*"
-thiserror = "*"
-serde = { version = "*", features = ["derive"] }
-serde_json = "*"
-serde_yaml = "*"
-toml = "*"
-bincode = "*"
-rkyv = { version = "*", features = ["std", "validation"] }
-dotenvy = "*"
-once_cell = "*"
-
-# --- Concurrency & async ---
-tokio = { version = "*", features = ["rt-multi-thread", "macros", "net", "fs", "io-util", "time", "signal"] }
-rayon = "*"
-crossbeam-channel = "*"
-parking_lot = "*"
-
-# --- NTFS / Windows / system info ---
-windows = { version = "*", features = [
-    "Win32_Foundation",
-    "Win32_System_SystemInformation",
-    "Win32_System_Console",
-    "Win32_System_Threading",
-    "Win32_System_Diagnostics_ToolHelp",
-    "Win32_System_Diagnostics_Debug",
-    "Win32_System_Ioctl",
-    "Win32_System_IO",
-    "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
-    "Win32_System_Com",
-    "Win32_UI_WindowsAndMessaging",
-    "Win32_System_ServiceManagement",
-] }
-windows-sys = { version = "*", features = [
-    "Win32_Foundation",
-    "Win32_System_SystemInformation",
-    "Win32_System_Threading",
-    "Win32_Storage_FileSystem",
-    "Win32_System_ServiceManagement",
-] }
-sysinfo = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["system", "process", "disk"] }
-
-# NTFS / USN journal crate placeholder; adjust when vendored.
-usn-journal-rs = { git = "https://github.com/example/usn-journal-rs.git", branch = "main" }
-
-# --- Search engine / index ---
-tantivy = { version = "*", features = ["mmap", "lz4-compression"] }
-fst = "*"
-memmap2 = "*"
-
-# --- Content extraction / OCR / HTTP ---
-extractous = { git = "https://github.com/extractous/extractous.git", branch = "main" }
-reqwest = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["rustls-tls", "stream"] }
-image = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["png", "jpeg"] }
-
-# --- IPC / serialization ---
-uuid = { version = "*", features = ["v4"] }
-
-# --- Logging / tracing ---
-tracing = "*"
-tracing-subscriber = { version = "*", features = ["env-filter", "fmt"] }
-
-# --- Data structures / utilities ---
-smallvec = "*"
-ahash = "*"
-indexmap = { version = "*", features = ["serde"] }
-lru = "*"
-slotmap = "*"
-bumpalo = "*"
-
-# --- CLI / UX for tools ---
-clap = { version = "*", features = ["derive", "env"] }
-console = "*"
-indicatif = "*"
-
-# --- UI stack (GPUI) ---
-gpui = { git = "https://github.com/zed-industries/zed.git", package = "gpui" }
-gpui-component = { git = "https://github.com/zed-industries/zed.git", package = "gpui-component" }
-
-# --- Testing / dev ---
-proptest = "*"
-criterion = { version = "*", default-features = false, features = ["html_reports"] }
-
-[workspace.lints.rust]
-unsafe_code = "forbid"
-missing_docs = "allow"
-
-[workspace.lints.clippy]
-all = "warn"
-pedantic = "warn"
-nursery = "warn"
-too_many_arguments = "allow"
-module_name_repetitions = "allow"
-
-[profile.dev]
-opt-level = 1
-debug = true
-incremental = true
-overflow-checks = true
-
-[profile.release]
-opt-level = 3
-lto = "thin"
-codegen-units = 1
-debug = false
-panic = "abort"
-incremental = false
-
-[profile.release-service]
-inherits = "release"
-opt-level = "z"
-
-[profile.release-worker]
-inherits = "release"
-opt-level = 3
-
-[patch.crates-io]
-# Add crate patches or forks here when vendored.
-#
 # Workspace is defined at repository root (../Cargo.toml).
-# This file is intentionally left without a [workspace]/[package] section to
-# avoid nesting; crates live under ultrasearch/crates/* and are members of the
-# root workspace.
+# This file is intentionally minimal to avoid nested workspaces.
+members = []
